chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-45 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.5192 / 2017. 2. For hearing. 16-01-2018 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Chandio advocate for appellant. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh D.P.G. Sindh. After hearing the learned counsel for the parties at some length, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this bail application, if appropriate directions are given to the trial Court to conclude the trial within a period of 30 working days, after receipt of this order. Learned D.P.G. Sindh has raised no objection to the above proposition. In view of above, this bail application is disposed of along with listed application as withdrawn with direction to the trial Court to conclude the trial within a period of 30 working days, after receipt of order of this court and in case, if the trial is not concluded within the stipulated period, the applicant would be at liberty to file fresh bail application on fresh grounds and then trial Court shall decide the same in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
